name: HNS_FIRE_INC_EVENT_DETAIL_
description: HNS_FIRE_INC_EVENT_DETAIL. This table stores fire or explosion incident event related data.

columns.Name: FIRE_INC_EVT_DETAIL_ID
columns.Comments: FIRE_INC_EVT_DETAIL_ID unique identifier. Primary key for HNS_FIRE_INC_EVENT_DETAIL table.

columns.Name: INCIDENT_DETAIL_ID
columns.Comments: Incident Detail identifier. Foreign key for HNS_INCIDENTS_DETAIL table.

columns.Name: FIRE_FLAG
columns.Comments: This column signifies if there was a fire event. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.YES_NO.

columns.Name: TYPE_OF_FIRE_CODE
columns.Comments: Type of Fire. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.ORA_HNS_TYPE_OF_FIRE.

columns.Name: FIRE_ORIGIN_CODE
columns.Comments: Fire Origin. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.ORA_HNS_FIRE_ORIGIN.

columns.Name: FIRE_IGNITION_SOURCE_CODE
columns.Comments: Fire Ignition Source. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.ORA_HNS_FIRE_IGNIT_SOURCE.

columns.Name: FIRE_FUEL_OR_ENERGY_CODE
columns.Comments: Fire Fuel or Energy. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.ORA_HNS_FIRE_FUEL_OR_ENERGY.

columns.Name: MATERIAL_FIRST_IGNITED_CODE
columns.Comments: Material First Ignited. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.ORA_HNS_FIRE_MAT_FIRST_IGNIT.

columns.Name: POSSIBLE_CAUSE_OF_FIRE_CODE
columns.Comments: Possible Cause of Fire. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.ORA_HNS_FIRE_POSSIBLE_CAUSE.

columns.Name: EXPLOSION_FLAG
columns.Comments: This column signifies if there was a explosion event. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.YES_NO.

columns.Name: TYPE_OF_EXPLOSION_CODE
columns.Comments: Type of Explosion. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.ORA_HNS_TYPE_OF_EXPLOSION.

columns.Name: EXPLOSION_ORIGIN_CODE
columns.Comments: Explosion Origin. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.ORA_HNS_EXPLOSION_ORIGIN.

columns.Name: EXPLOSION_IGNITION_SOURCE_CODE
columns.Comments: Explosion Ignition Source. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.ORA_HNS_EXPLOSION_IGNIT_SOURCE.

columns.Name: EXPLOSION_FUEL_OR_ENERGY_CODE
columns.Comments: Explosion Fuel or Energy. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.ORA_HNS_EXPLOS_FUEL_OR_ENERGY.

columns.Name: POSSIBLE_CAUSE_OF_EXPLOSION_CD
columns.Comments: Possible Cause of Explosion. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.ORA_HNS_EXPLOS_POSSIBLE_CAUSE.

columns.Name: REPLN_FIRE_FIGHTING_EQUIP_FLAG
columns.Comments: Replenish Fire Fighting Equipment.

columns.Name: DELETED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Deleted flag.This column signifies whether the Fire Or Explosion incident event is checked for deletion.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.
